_meta.note: Maps HTS prefix → agencies that require notice/permit. Prefix matching: longest wins. Not exhaustive — covers the high-volume cases an importer is most likely to encounter.

02.name: Meat products
02.action: FSIS inspection at port of entry

03.name: Seafood
03.action: FDA Prior Notice required ≥ 4 hours before arrival

09.name: Coffee/tea/spices
09.action: FDA Prior Notice for food shipments

20.name: Prepared vegetables/fruits
20.action: FDA Prior Notice; LACF registration may apply

22.name: Beverages/spirits/wine
22.action: TTB import permit + COLA; FDA Prior Notice

23.name: Animal feed
23.action: FDA Prior Notice; medicated feed needs CVM clearance

30.name: Pharmaceuticals
30.action: FDA establishment + drug listing; DEA for controlled substances

33.name: Cosmetics
33.action: FDA cosmetic registration; some color additives need approval

38.name: Misc chemicals
38.action: TSCA + FIFRA possible (pesticides need EPA registration)

61.name: Apparel — knit
61.action: Country of origin marking; some HTS subject to forced-labor watch

62.name: Apparel — woven
62.action: Country of origin marking; UFLPA high-risk if cotton from China

63.name: Made-up textiles
63.action: UFLPA high-risk if cotton from China

71.name: Precious metals/jewelry
71.action: Kimberley Process certificate for rough diamonds

84.name: Machinery
84.action: EPA engine emissions for off-road equipment

87.name: Vehicles
87.action: HS-7 Declaration; EPA Form 3520-1 for emissions

94.name: Furniture
94.action: CPSC general certificate for children's products

95.name: Toys
95.action: CPSC children's product certificate; ASTM F963 testing

97.name: Art/antiques
97.action: Cultural property review; CITES if biological material
